description_long: This helmet features a smooth, rounded dome with a highly reflective gold finish covering most of its exterior. The front section is dominated by a glossy, opaque black visor that wraps around the face area, providing full facial coverage. The helmet's sides are reinforced with pronounced structural ridges and a circular detail near the ear region, suggesting additional protection or possible attachment points. The surface is sleek and polished, with no visible vents, graphics, or branding. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, prioritizing both protection and style. The interior is not visible, but it is likely lined with padding for comfort and impact absorption.
description: A sleek, gold helmet with a glossy black full-face visor and smooth, rounded contours. The design is minimalistic, with no visible graphics, vents, or branding.
description_view_0: Front view shows the smooth, gold dome with the visor not visible.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlights the glossy black full-face visor and gold side detailing.
description_view_2: Top view displays the helmet's rounded shape and the full extent of the black visor.
description_view_3: Left-side view mirrors the right, showing the visor and gold structural features.
